forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
do not only scale all coefficients; structural changes required
required_changes: restructure approach_progress to increase margin between partial_progress and early_failure (e.g., stronger scaling or quality adjustment)
replace terminal_reward with separate crash_penalty (sufficiently negative) and safe_landing_bonus (stringent conditions)
preserve progress-conditioned gating and components that favor partial_progress

intended_fix: make a conservative reward with clear components
use analyzer context to gate known failure patterns
expected_effect: Provide a simple, interpretable baseline candidate that reacts to known failures.
risk: May be too weak for difficult tasks.
